key_quote: The probabilistic→logical proof bridge—the stated core contribution—is critically under-specified: neither the encoding of continuous posteriors in QF_LRA nor the precise semantic level of the SMT proof is fully characterized.
rationale: The formally certified manipulation evidence approach is acknowledged as novel. Blockers are: underspecified proof bridge encoding, uncharacterized FO-MTL fragment, no verified compilation step, causal discovery without learning guarantees, and conflation of object-level and meta-level proofs. All depth/rigor. Category B.
